blocked_prediction_inputs: native contacts, distance maps, residue-residue proximity, and coordinate-derived topology
native biological assembly contacts and ligand/metal coordination geometry before sealing
AlphaFold, ESMFold, RoseTTAFold, or other structure models before sealing
post-seal validation annotations before prediction hash
prior score outcomes as prediction evidence
internal runtime artifacts as biological evidence

prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: ENDO-1,4-BETA-XYLANASE C. Entity description: ENDO-1,4-B-XYLANASE C. Organism: Aspergillus luchuensis. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived low-complexity tendency high; sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V69 E65 metadata context marks: assembly_context oligomer_context partner_copy_context. Known E65 marks are allowed; hard-topology discovery labels are withheld from prediction. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
metadata_context_reasons: public metadata indicates biological copy/oligomer/assembly context

v69_context_policy.context_derivation: V69 E65 uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only. It carries established E65 marks but withholds hard-topology missing-word labels from prediction context so V69 can discover them.
reasons: public metadata indicates biological copy/oligomer/assembly context
